pdg_node.informal_desc: Computes template-matching features from the provided input without persistent state mutation.

declaration.name: templatefeaturecomputation
declaration.docstring: Computes template-matching features from the provided input without persistent state mutation.
declaration.conceptual_summary: ReferencePatternSimilarityEncoding. Maps a structured input context into a numeric feature vector by comparing observed data structures against a predefined set of reference patterns. Each output component summarizes match strength, alignment quality, or related similarity statistics, producing a compact representation of how the input conforms to multiple prototypes. The mapping is computed without side effects, so identical inputs yield identical outputs.. Applications: Medical imaging: encode similarity of localized anatomical structures to canonical morphology templates for downstream classification., Cybersecurity telemetry: transform event-sequence windows into similarity features against known behavioral motifs for anomaly scoring., Materials science microscopy: compute descriptor vectors by matching observed microstructure patches to reference texture patterns., Speech processing: represent short acoustic segments via similarity to prototypical spectral-temporal shapes for phonetic inference.
